_comment: Canonical MCP registration for the event-bridge channel. The carrier (claude-adopt) writes a per-worker copy into the worker's project with EVENT_BRIDGE_CONFIG / EVENT_BRIDGE_STATE_DIR pointing at that worker's files. Launch the session with: claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:event-bridge (custom channels are not on the official allowlist). Combine with --channels plugin:telegram@claude-plugins-official for chat + permission relay.
